black_frame_audit.interpretation: Possible intentional black transition plates, but should still be explained or replaced by formal transition assets in pipeline delivery.

effect_templates.observed_use: Opening black collage plate with large yellow title.
effect_templates.recommended_use: Film opening and training class title.

effect_templates.observed_use: Course or module label in clean white/blue style.

effect_templates.recommended_use: Instructor remarks, student interviews, and narration emphasis.

effect_templates.observed_use: Film-strip card between story and montage sections.
Soft light or brief warm visual punctuation.
Warm emphasis around memory or completion moments.
effect_templates.recommended_use: Highlight smiles, handshake, group success, or awards.

effect_templates.observed_use: Side fill for vertical or mismatched-ratio footage.
effect_templates.recommended_use: Preserve real proof footage while filling 16:9 canvas.
Sparingly introduce people, teams, or class memories.

effect_templates.observed_use: Clean closing or reflection text card.
effect_templates.recommended_use: Closing quote, instructor message, or final reflection.

pipeline_recommendation.material_map_boundary: Material map should judge factual content and usable ranges, not own effect style.
pipeline_recommendation.contract_boundary: Segment contract should expose section_role, layout, audio_role, and story purpose.
pipeline_recommendation.effects_boundary: Effect intent should map segment roles to template_id and required_for_story.
pipeline_recommendation.remotion_boundary: Remotion produces bounded effect assets only; ffmpeg/contract-run remains final assembly owner.
pipeline_recommendation.verify_boundary: Delivery should require effect_render_verification when effects are planned.

review_verdict.main_gap: black_frame_audit fails on three short black intervals; pipeline should either formalize them as transition assets or fix them.
review_verdict.next_action: Use these nine templates as the initial training recap effect dictionary and verify rendered effects with contact sheets/effect_render_verification.
